faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Port Richmond homes?
faqs.answer: Port Richmond residents commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows. Our $350-$550 treatment addresses all common spider species found in Staten Island homes and businesses, with special attention to basements, attics, and waterfront properties near the Kill Van Kull.
